name: Cottonwood Community
description_short: Cottonwood Community Federal Credit Union is an Idaho-based credit union established in 1942, serving over 9,800 members with $238.4M in assets through 1 branch and 6 ATMs.
description_long:
Cottonwood Community Federal Credit Union was established in 1942 and is headquartered in Cottonwood, Idaho. As the 14th largest credit union in Idaho, it has grown to serve over 9,800 loyal members with a dedicated staff of over 45 employees. The institution manages $238.4 million in assets and maintains a geographically-focused membership model designed to serve the local community and surrounding businesses.

The credit union offers a comprehensive range of financial products including checking and savings accounts, money market accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), IRAs/KEOGH accounts, auto loans, personal loans, business loans, and mortgage financing. Members also have access to modern banking conveniences such as online banking, mobile app functionality for both iOS and Android, bill pay, remote deposit capture, wire transfers, e-statements, and online loan payments. The institution operates 1 primary branch location at 1606 Lewiston Street and maintains a network of 6 ATMs for member convenience.

Cottonwood Community FCU distinguishes itself as a member-owned cooperative financial institution positioned to offer lower fees and better rates compared to traditional banks. The credit union has built a reputation for personalized service, with recent member reviews noting the "friendliest staff" with thorough knowledge of their systems. The institution provides membership eligibility based on geographic community access, making it accessible to local residents and businesses seeking community-focused banking.

The institution currently faces some operational challenges. Recent website redesigns have generated member confusion and usability complaints, with at least one member expressing frustration about the new online banking interface. The lobby is currently closed, and the website indicates potential ongoing service issues affecting online banking and mobile app functionality. For consumers in the Cottonwood area seeking local, member-owned banking with competitive rates, this credit union offers viable services, though prospective members should be aware of recent digital platform transitions and verify current service status before opening accounts.
services: Bill pay and online loan payments
pros: 14th largest credit union in Idaho with $238.4M in assets and strong financial stability
Comprehensive product suite including checking, savings, CDs, IRAs, auto loans, personal loans, business loans, and mortgages
Member-owned structure positioned to offer lower fees and better rates than traditional banks
Serves over 9,800 members with dedicated staff of 45+ employees providing personalized service
Modern digital banking options including mobile app for iOS/Android, online banking, remote deposit capture, and bill pay
6 ATMs plus 1 branch location for cash access and in-person service
Member reviews cite friendly, knowledgeable staff with thorough system expertise
cons: Lobby currently closed, limiting in-person banking convenience for members
Website and digital services experiencing reported outages and service issues affecting login and traditional services
Recent website redesign has generated member complaints about confusion and poor usability
Limited physical footprint with only 1 branch location, restricting accessibility outside Cottonwood area
Geographic membership restriction limits eligibility to specific community residents and businesses
best_for: Cottonwood, Idaho residents and local business owners seeking community-focused banking
Members prioritizing member-owned cooperative institutions with potentially lower fees than traditional banks
Consumers comfortable with online/ATM banking due to current lobby closure
Local businesses requiring comprehensive lending services including business loans and lines of credit
diagnosis: Cottonwood Community FCU is best for Idaho residents in or near Cottonwood seeking locally-owned banking with competitive rates and comprehensive financial services. Primary caveat: verify current service status before joining, as the institution is experiencing website/app issues and operates with limited branch access (currently closed lobby), making digital banking proficiency essential.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
